summary: Complete production-readiness testing for OCR SaaS platform. All 31 backend tests passed (100%). Full frontend user journey tested successfully: Landing -> Register -> Login -> Dashboard -> API Keys -> Playground -> Analytics -> Docs -> Logout. Mobile responsiveness verified.

minor.note: Clipboard API throws error in automated testing due to browser security restrictions - this is expected behavior and not a real issue

backend: Playground OCR extraction for PAN card
Playground OCR extraction for Aadhaar card
Playground OCR extraction for Driving License
Playground OCR auto document type detection
Public API OCR extraction with API key (/api/v1/extract)
frontend: Landing page - Hero section, Features, Documents, Pricing, Footer visible
Registration flow - Form validation, success redirect to dashboard
Login flow - Form validation, success redirect to dashboard with toast
Protected routes - Redirects to login when not authenticated
Dashboard Overview - Stats cards, document breakdown, recent extractions
API Keys page - Create key dialog, key list, revoke functionality
Playground page - Upload area, document type selector, extract button
Analytics page - Stats grid, usage chart, document breakdown pie chart
Documentation page - cURL/Python/JS tabs, code examples, API reference
Navigation - Sidebar links, mobile hamburger menu
Logout functionality - Clears session, redirects to landing
mobile_responsiveness: Landing page - Buttons stacked vertically, readable text
Login page - Form fits viewport, touch-friendly inputs
Dashboard - Sidebar hidden, hamburger menu works

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Error handling and loading states properly implemented
API endpoints secured with JWT and API key authentication

test_credentials.note: Test users created with pattern test_*@example.com during testing

seed_data_creation: Test users and API keys created with pattern TEST_* prefix during pytest execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: Complete production-readiness testing completed. Backend APIs fully functional with Gemini 3 Flash Vision OCR integration. Frontend user journey tested end-to-end. All interactive elements have data-testid attributes. Mobile responsiveness verified. No critical issues found.
